steps.title: Calculate the volume of the cube
steps.content:
The sample is a cube with edge length 0.90 m. Using the volume formula $V = s^3$:
$$V = (0.90)^3 = 0.729 \text{ m}^3$$

steps.title: Calculate the mass
steps.content:
From the density formula Density = Mass / Volume, we rearrange to get:
$$\text{Mass} = \text{Density} \times \text{Volume} = 807 \times 0.729 = 588.303 \text{ kg}$$
To the nearest whole number, this is 588 kg. That matches choice A — A is correct.
